feedback: This is a new service – your feedback (opens in new tab) will help us to improve it.
contactUsForHelpText: If you need help using this service, contact us.
contactUsDetailsEmailLinkText: find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab)
contactUsDetailsEmailIntroSuffix: to get your local court’s email address.
contactUsDetailsEmailHelp: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
contactUsDetailsCallChargesLinkText: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab)

errors.title: There is a problem
errors.defaultSpecialCharacter: {fieldName} must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

date.notRealDate: Date must be a real date
date.futureDate: Date must be in the past
date.pastDate: Date must be in the future
date.yearMustBeSameOrAfter: The year must be the same as or after {{minYear}}

documentUpload.wrongFileTypeDocStore: The selected file must be a DOC/DOT/DOCX/DOTX, XLS/XLT/XLA/XLSX/XLTX/XLSB, PPT/POT/PPS/PPA/PPTX/POTX/PPSX, PDF, TXT/RTF/CSV, JPG/JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF/TIFF
documentUpload.fileTooLargeDocStore: File you have uploaded is too big. Document files must be less than {{maxSize}}.
documentUpload.fileTooLargeMedia: File you have uploaded is too big. Image files must be smaller than {{maxSize}}.
documentUpload.fileTotalTooLargeDocStore: The selected files must be smaller than {{maxSize}}. Delete one or more files or reduce the file sizes.
documentUpload.filenameTooLong: The file name must be {{maxLength}} characters or fewer
documentUpload.uploadFailed: The selected file could not be uploaded – try again
documentUpload.fileDeleteFailed: The file could not be removed – try again

timeout.title: You'll be signed out soon
timeout.subtitle: For your security, you'll be signed out in
timeout.caption: Your previous answers have been saved.

characterCount.textareaDescriptionText: You can enter up to %{count} characters

pageNotFound.title: Page not found
pageNotFound.paragraph: If you typed the web address, check it is correct.
pageNotFound.paragraph2: If you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.
pageNotFound.paragraph3: If the web address is correct or you selected a link or button, contact us by email or telephone.
pageNotFound.heading: Email
pageNotFound.paragraph4: Use the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
pageNotFound.paragraph5: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
pageNotFound.paragraph8: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab).

serviceUnavailable.title: Sorry, the service is unavailable
serviceUnavailable.paragraphMinutes: You will be able to use the service in {{minutes}} minutes.
serviceUnavailable.paragraphDateAndTime: You will be able to use the service from {{time}} on {{date}}.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph2: For help with your case, contact us by email or telephone.
serviceUnavailable.heading: Email
serviceUnavailable.paragraph3: Use the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph4: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph7: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab).

technicalError.title: Sorry, there is a problem with the service
technicalError.paragraph2: We saved your answers. They will be available for 30 days.
technicalError.paragraph3: For help with your case, contact us by email or telephone.
technicalError.heading: Email
technicalError.paragraph4: Use the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
technicalError.paragraph5: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
technicalError.paragraph8: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab).

accessDenied.title: You do not have access to this page
accessDenied.paragraph: Contact us if you think you should have access, or if you need help with your case.
accessDenied.heading: Email
accessDenied.paragraph2: Use the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
accessDenied.paragraph3: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
accessDenied.paragraph6: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab).

noApplicationIdInSession.title: Application not available
noApplicationIdInSession.paragraph: This application is not available. It may have already been submitted in a different window.

documentNotAvailable.title: Document not available
documentNotAvailable.paragraph: The selected file could not be downloaded – try again.
